submodule.description: This path is a separate Git repository. Gitmun shows it here as a submodule boundary, not as a normal parent-repo file diff.

warning.bodyPrefix: Gitmun doesn't yet include a built-in merge editor. For the best experience - particularly when resolving merge conflicts - we recommend configuring an external diff tool such as
warning.bodySuffix: . Without one, conflicted files will need to be edited manually.
warning.title: No diff tool configured
